name: Bruno Delbonnel
biography:
Bruno Delbonnel, ASC, AFC (born 1957) is a French cinematographer, known for works from a number of high-profile directors, including Jean-Pierre Jeunet, Tim Burton, the Coen brothers, Joe Wright and Wes Anderson.
